DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Directory where the generated MetaDataQuality workspace will be created.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional. MetaTransformBinding workspace used to scan only validated scripts.
Scans all TransformScript instances in one workspace.
When --binding-workspace is supplied, only TransformScript rows with Validation-backed TransformBinding rows are scanned.
Creates one MetaDataQuality workspace with model-derived, reviewable DQ candidates.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional. Show up to n candidate cases. Implies --show-cases. Default: 20.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional. Include candidate ids in adjustment output. Implies --show-cases.
Default output guides the full-pack-first path.
Use --show-cases when you want to make small adjustments before SQL generation.
Use --show-candidate-ids when promoting individual generated candidates.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Promote one generated candidate. May be provided more than once.
Promotes generated DQ candidates for data-quality-to-sql output.
